intent.description: Bootstrap the Agentic IR Engine node to document the new command pattern.

payload.title: Agentic IR Engine (bin/engine.py)
payload.description: The deterministic Software 1.0 actuator that reads declarative Agentic Intents (IR), permanently logs them to the intent_ledger for lineage/time-travel, and then mutates the graph. This entirely replaces the anti-pattern of LLMs writing ad-hoc Python scripts.

payload.title: Deprecation of Ad-Hoc Actuator Scripts
payload.details: Formally banned the use of ephemeral Python scripts for graph mutation. All state changes must now be declared as JSON intents in `/intents/` and executed via `bin/engine.py`. This ensures perfect lineage in `intent_ledger.jsonl` and decouples the AI's cognitive work (IR) from deterministic file I/O operations.
